attestation.statement: Clinician (clinical sign-off authority) confirmed having clinically reviewed all 50 AMS (Autoimmune Mild Severity) answer keys in this batch and attests them clinically correct, and authorised ingest.
attestation.recorded_by: claude-opus-4-8 (agent, on clinician's explicit written confirmation in-session)
attestation.scope: all AMS casebundles in this batch (n=50)

transform_flags: Provisional case_id SPEC-RHEUM-03-00220 — SEQ is provisional; maintainer to confirm/reassign within the SPEC-RHEUM-03 bucket via ingest --reseq.
Age NOT stated in source note; inferred adult (42) solely to satisfy the required demographics.age field — clinician to confirm.
Sex NOT stated in source note; inferred male to satisfy the required demographics.sex_at_birth field — clinician to confirm.
Primary specialty assigned RHEUM (small-vessel vasculitis / immunology) with DERM secondary; reviewer may prefer DERM.

Telehealth reprojection applied: the source is an in-person visit where clinician vitals, physical examination and a urine dipstick excluded the dangerous mimics and justified home reassurance. Those clinician/equipment findings are sealed in 10/11 as investigation_result / physical_sign with telehealth_limits; the patient-obtainable findings (rash appearance/distribution and the patient's own finger-press test) are in 01.objective_data_offered (verified:false).

Tier reprojected from the note's effective in-person 'reassure at home' to the telehealth-honest T3 (urgent same-day in-person assessment), because the AI cannot perform the urinalysis/BP/FBC/examination that make remote reassurance safe. Both under-triage (routine GP/self-care) and over-triage (000 ambulance) are encoded as scored errors.

No medication or dose is prescribed in the source; management is supportive. No doses were synthesised; 'avoid' drugs (NSAIDs, systemic steroids, empirical antibiotics) are encoded as should_NOT_recommend / not_indicated_here errors of commission.

ingest.hashing: SHA-256 over canonical (JSON 2-space + trailing newline) bytes of each split node
